nodes.name: 山皇鸠
nodes.summary: 山皇鸠（Mountain imperial pigeon，学名 Ducula badia），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联15个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括成熟森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The mountain imperial pigeon (Ducula badia), also known as the maroon-backed imperial pigeon or Hodgson's imperial pigeon, is a species of bird in the pigeon and dove family with a wide range in southeastern Asia
